scripts.build:apk: tauri android build --apk --target aarch64 && mkdir -p release && cp src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/release/app-universal-release.apk release/
scripts.build:deb: tauri build --bundles deb && mkdir -p release && cp src-tauri/target/release/bundle/deb/sistema-impresion_*_amd64.deb release/
